activation.verdict: carried from F0; not contradicted at F1

assumptions.evidence: dominant_failure_organ=gate; down_only 0.20 vs gate_up 0.92 rel_err; the inversion was spent correctly at A1_1p0
0 evictions at 64GiB, RAM 70 to 18 GB, swap free 906MB; correct cap is 20 GB
assumptions.statement: a large expert cache accelerates a single lockstep pass

assumptions.evidence: parent ppl 1.61 to 39.33 across six domains on the same harness that produced the collapses
assumptions.statement: the bf16 control is healthy enough to trust a negative

assumptions.evidence: 120B collapsed at 0.80 to 0.89 per-expert; 235B collapsed at a stricter COMPLETE 1.0075 and 0.4930
assumptions.statement: the capability cliff moves with parent scale

assumptions.evidence: 12/12 packed rows, argmax agreement exactly 0.0, symKL 7.61 to 13.47
assumptions.statement: raw-weight PQ/VQ preserves capability at ~1 bit

assumptions.evidence: A1_1p0 applied the inversion and still collapsed 6/6
assumptions.statement: correct organ allocation rescues a sub-bit artifact

assumptions.evidence: F0 and F1 were both searched entirely below their cliffs; no parent has ever had a passing rate established
assumptions.statement: some rate on some parent passed the capability gate

assumptions.evidence: NOT established and NOT claimed. F1 falsifies one representation family. QAT, distillation, compressibility training, structured pruning and learned sharing change the source and are not bound by the rate-distortion limit of the original weights. All are untested.
assumptions.statement: no Hawking method can preserve capability at or below 1 bit

assumptions.evidence: R5_rownorm_strat was never reached at F1
assumptions.statement: row-norm stratification recovers the collapsed gate/up rows

assumptions.evidence: R3_routing_aware was never reached at F1; routing_partition_source is null
assumptions.statement: coldest-quartile harshening buys rate at fixed capability

boundary: Two complete byte plans, one at 1.0075 BPW and one at 0.4930 BPW, both collapsed 6/6 on a real parent-vs-packed forward with a healthy control. No frontier selected. The falsified object is the raw-weight PQ/VQ representation family at approximately one bit, not sub-bit itself.

capability_cliff.note: the cliff did not move with scale. A ~2x parameter count bought nothing: 235B collapsed at a COMPLETE 1.0075 BPW, which is a stricter accounting than the F0 per-expert 0.80 to 0.89 band. Scale is not a rate argument.

failures.detail: NOT RUN at F1. No Doctor pass was executed at capability fidelity on Qwen3-235B. Recorded as an untried intervention, not as a failure of Doctor.
F0 only: D4_pq_doctor, residual_codebook at 0.15 bpw reserve, per-expert whole 0.88845, collapsed on a real forward (argmax 0.0 to 0.3636).

doctor.honest_note: same-budget Doctor at capability fidelity was NOT yet run for F1. The F1 collapse therefore does not falsify Doctor; it falsifies the undoctored raw-weight PQ/VQ family.

methods.evidence: confirmed independently at F0 and F1; necessary, not sufficient
methods.name: organ inversion byte allocation

methods.evidence: parent ppl 1.61 to 39.33 is what makes the F1 negative trustworthy
methods.name: mandatory live bf16 parent control per prompt

methods.evidence: changes the source, so it is not bound by the raw-weight rate-distortion limit falsified at F1
methods.name: quantization-aware training at or below 1 BPW

methods.evidence: changes the source; untested at any Hawking parent
methods.name: distillation into a sub-bit student

methods.evidence: makes the weights compressible instead of compressing incompressible weights
methods.name: compressibility-inducing training

methods.evidence: reduces original_weight_count, which is the denominator of the ceiling
methods.name: structured pruning before sub-bit coding

methods.evidence: post-hoc sharing is dead (cosine 1e-4); LEARNED sharing creates the shared component instead of assuming it
methods.name: learned (trained) expert sharing

methods.evidence: never run at F1; Doctor bytes count toward the ceiling
methods.name: same-budget Doctor at capability fidelity

negative_transfer.claim: raising the rate until something passes locates the capability cliff
negative_transfer.evidence: F0 searched 0.80 to 0.89 per-expert and F1 searched 0.4930 to 1.0075 complete. Both parents were searched ENTIRELY BELOW their cliffs and neither ever established a passing rate. Two parents of methodology produced zero positive controls, and the response to that is a different method at the ceiling, not a higher rate.
forbidden: bisecting inside a fully collapsed band
negative_transfer.replacement: change the representation at the ceiling. A missing positive control is a reason to change method, not to raise rate.

organ_sensitivity.inversion: mlp1/gate+up is the SENSITIVE organ; mlp2/down tolerates more
organ_sensitivity.inversion_is_necessary_not_sufficient: A1_1p0 spent the inversion correctly (gate/up 1.25 vs down 0.50) and still collapsed 6/6. Correct allocation inside a failed representation does not rescue it.

provenance: F1 Qwen3-235B campaign, SEALED. Metrics derived directly from the 18 read-only checkpoint rows at /Users/scammermike/hawking-qwen-recovery-20260720/reports/condense/general_frontier/QWEN_GRAVITY/checkpoints (QWEN_GRAVITY_STATE ladder_sha 563ad51128717126, status SEALED). Nothing here is re-derived or re-run.

domains_collapsing_first: all six simultaneously: factual, code, math, science, instruction, reasoning. Next-token argmax agreement is exactly 0.0 on every prompt at both rates, so no domain survived long enough to collapse first.

result.evidence_class_note: 5 tokens per prompt is below the 1000-token CAPABILITY threshold. SHORT_END_TO_END may not SELECT a frontier; it is ample to REJECT one at argmax agreement 0.0.
result.reason: both sealed candidates collapsed 6/6 on a real parent-vs-packed forward against a healthy control; 12 of 12 packed rows failed the gate

rate_ceiling.law: Hawking does not climb above one bit to discover where conventional quantization works. Hawking changes the representation, model, allocation and treatment until useful intelligence survives at one bit or below.
rate_ceiling.quality_reference: the parent BF16 model; a compressed high-rate anchor is not required and must not be scheduled
rate_ceiling.rate_change_law: downward only, after materially distinct method families are exhausted at the ceiling; upward never

R0_parent.kind: bf16 source parent, the quality reference
R0_parent.why_this_matters: the control is healthy (ppl 1.61 to 39.33 across six domains), so the collapse of every packed row is a property of the representation, not of a broken harness. A negative result is only trustworthy with a live control.

rate_response.representation: shared_grammar gate/up d16 k1024 s1 + down d64 k1024 s1

rate_response.note: 1.0075 > 1.0 complete BPW: ILLEGAL under the ceiling. Retained as a measurement, NEVER as a search seed. This point must be rebudgeted to <= 1.0, not climbed past.
rate_response.representation: product_quant gate/up d32 k32 s8 + down d16 k16 s2, organ-inverted

representation.seed_policy: the highest legal search seed is 1.0 complete BPW. Any prior derived from this curve that exceeds 1.0 is void by law, including search_start_bpw. Rate priors seed a search; they never select.
representation.winners_note: no representation won. Nothing passed the capability gate at any rate.

resources.lesson: the resource lesson is the 20 GB cache cap, NOT 64 GB. A single lockstep pass has zero cross-layer expert reuse.

capability_cliff_moved_with_scale.evidence: 120B collapsed at 0.80 to 0.89 per-expert whole BPW (D2 0.80508, D6 0.82885, D4 0.88845); 235B collapsed at COMPLETE 1.0075 and 0.4930 with argmax 0.0 on every prompt. A ~2x parameter count did not move the cliff, and F1's accounting is the stricter of the two.

codebook_sharing_structure_or_amortizati.evidence: R2_subhalf_best used shared_grammar codebooks amortized over 128 experts and collapsed at least as hard (symKL 9.34 to 13.47) as the unshared PQ at twice the rate

dominant_runtime_bottleneck.evidence: expert-outer/candidate-inner removed 2.7h of re-streaming; 51MB of persisted parent logits removes 1.33h per restart

geometry_transferred.answer: the organ inversion transferred; nothing else did
geometry_transferred.evidence: dominant_failure_organ=gate at both F0 and F1; the inversion was necessary and not sufficient

higher_dimensional_vq_helped.evidence: the F0 weight-space gain (rel_error 0.782 to 0.668 with VQ dimension) did not convert into any capability at F1; weight-space error remains a proxy, never a pass criterion

hot_cold_routing_mattered.evidence: R3_routing_aware never executed; routing_partition_source null; the F0 88-token calibration finding stands

organs_consuming_most_rescue_bytes.evidence: gate/up 1.2527 vs down 0.5007 bpw at A1_1p0; gate_up 0.92 vs down_only 0.20 rel_err

quality_domains_collapsing_first.evidence: next-token argmax agreement exactly 0.0 on factual, code, math, science, instruction and reasoning at both rates

routing.note: R3_routing_aware was never reached; the F0 finding that 88 calibration tokens is too weak stands unrefuted and unretested at F1.

runtime.note: expert-outer/candidate-inner loop order and persisted parent logits (51MB on disk) are the two measured runtime levers.

lessons.detail: fused per-layer expert tensors; the packer substitutes via expert_hook on a real forward
51MB of persisted parent logits removes 1.33h of re-forward per restart

storage.mode: release source after harvest; re-download from pinned revision

verdict: NEGATIVE RESULT FOR THE RAW-WEIGHT PQ/VQ REPRESENTATION FAMILY AT APPROXIMATELY ONE BIT on Qwen3-235B. The family fails; sub-bit is NOT shown to be impossible, and this is NOT a licence to raise the one-bit ceiling. Methods that change the source (QAT, distillation, compressibility training, structured pruning, learned sharing) are not bound by the rate-distortion limit of the original weights and remain untested. The response to this result is to change representation AT the ceiling, never to bracket upward.
